title: hymenophyllum scabrum
intro: Hymenophyllum scabrum, also known as Rough Rock Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum scabrum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hymenophyllum scabrum is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
